creator: freebsd@never4evil.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)


Yes, you cannot build emulators/mess without the patches referenced in PR#205097.

That being said, I'm wondering if it would be worthwhile to compress the two ports into a single port with an options dialog box to build either mame, mess, or both.

The only potential problem with doing this is what to call the "new" port so that it's clear to the end user what the port actually is.  Perhaps, emulators/mame_mess?
